4a2014ec256f4b9babab6efa6f27203deba4fb25: fragment BazelInvocationNode on BazelInvocation { authenticatedUser { displayName userUUID } build { buildUUID } connectionMetadata { connectionLastOpenAt timeSinceLastConnectionMillis } endedAt exitCodeName id invocationID startedAt username } query FindBazelInvocations($after: Cursor, $before: Cursor, $first: Int, $last: Int, $orderBy: BazelInvocationOrder, $where: BazelInvocationWhereInput) { findBazelInvocations( after: $after first: $first before: $before last: $last orderBy: $orderBy where: $where ) { edges { node { ...BazelInvocationNode } } pageInfo { endCursor hasNextPage hasPreviousPage startCursor } } }
